title: 7 Best Campaign Monitor Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Campaign Monitor alternatives. Compare free and paid email marketing tools for agencies, small businesses, and creators.
intro: While Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management for agencies, other email marketing platforms may offer better value, more advanced features, or lower costs depending on your business needs. Whether you're looking for a free tier, advanced automation, or industry-specific tools, there's likely a better fit available today.
why_switch: Find more affordable pricing options with free tiers and lower starting costs
Access specialized features for e-commerce, creators, or transactional email
Get better customer support ratings and user satisfaction scores

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers an even lower starting price ($9) than Campaign Monitor with a generous free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers. It combines simplicity with powerful features like automation, landing pages, and pop-ups, making it ideal for budget-conscious teams.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign provides superior advanced automation and integrated CRM capabilities that go beyond Campaign Monitor's offerings. If you need lead scoring, site tracking, and dynamic content personalization, ActiveCampaign is a more powerful enterprise solution.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptional free tier offering 100,000 emails monthly and multi-channel capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. It's the best choice if you need both transactional email and marketing automation in one platform.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers a completely free tier for up to 500 contacts with solid automation and audience segmentation features. While Trustpilot ratings are lower, it remains the most accessible entry point for teams new to email marketing.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit specializes in serving content creators with visual automation sequences and subscriber tagging that Campaign Monitor doesn't emphasize. Its free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers makes it perfect for growing newsletters and digital products.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 emails monthly and multi-channel capabilities including SMS and WhatsApp. If you prefer a more traditional email-focused platform, MailerLite and ConvertKit both provide free tiers supporting 1,000 subscribers with solid automation features.

faq.q: What is the best Campaign Monitor alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the best choice for small businesses, combining the lowest starting price ($9) with an intuitive drag-drop editor, landing pages, and automation. It delivers professional features without the complexity, making it ideal for lean teams managing modest email lists.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at just $9 per month compared to Campaign Monitor's $11. Brevo and Mailchimp both offer completely free tiers, making them cost-effective starting points before you scale to paid plans with advanced features.
